sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; import api from '../services/api'; const Dashboard = () => { const { user } = useAuth(); const [stats, setStats] = useState({}); useEffect(() => { fetchStats(); }, []); const fetchStats = async () => { try { const response = await api.get('/dashboard/'); setStats(response.data); } catch (error) { console.error('Error fetching stats:', error); } }; return (
{user?.role === 'admin' && ( <>
Total Utilisateurs
{stats.total_users || 0}
Total Matières
{stats.total_subjects || 0}
Total Cours
{stats.total_courses || 0}
Total Contrôles
{stats.total_controls || 0}
)} {user?.role === 'instructor' && ( <>
Mes Matières
{stats.my_subjects || 0}
Mes Cours
{stats.my_courses || 0}
Mes Contrôles
{stats.my_controls || 0}
Soumissions en attente
{stats.pending_submissions || 0}
)} {user?.role === 'trainee' && ( <>
Mes Cours
{stats.my_progress || 0}
Mes Soumissions
{stats.my_submissions || 0}
Mes Recherches
{stats.my_research || 0}
)} {(user?.role === 'coordinator' || user?.role === 'supervisor') && ( <>
Total Stagiaires
{stats.total_trainees || 0}
Formations Terminées
{stats.completed_training || 0}
)}
); }; export default Dashboard;
